tagline: The Databricks ODBC Driver version 2.9.2 is now available for download from the ODBC driver download page.
what_it_does: The Databricks ODBC Driver version 2.9.2 is now available for download from the ODBC driver download page. This release includes the following fixes and new features: The process name is now used as the default UserAgentEntry if the UserAgentEntry is not explicitly set. Added support for Databricks domains cloud.databricks.us and cloud.databricks.mil.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
